title: TerraLite
description: Lightweight Vanilla+ modpack with better worldgen, FPS boosts and optional shaders.
body:
###  About This Modpack
This is a lightweight Vanilla+ modpack for players who want a better Minecraft experience — without changing core gameplay. You’ll enjoy improved world generation, boosted performance, quality-of-life tools, and visual upgrades like shaders and animations. Perfect for survival, multiplayer, or casual exploration.

###  Why You’ll Love It
- No gameplay overhauls
- Massive visual and performance upgrades
- Lightweight and stable on most systems
- Compatible with singleplayer, LAN and servers

### Exploration in a Better World
- Terralith – 100+ stunning new biomes
- Structory & Towns and Towers – Adds natural-looking structures and villages
- Nullscape – Epic vertical terrain in The End
- Amplified Nether – A bold, vertical twist on the Nether dimension
- Chunky – Pre-generates chunks for smoother exploration

### Performance
No matter your system, this pack runs well thanks to:
- Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast – Core performance boost stack
- ModernFix & BadOptimizations – Remove bottlenecks and memory leaks
- Entity Culling & Concurrent Chunk Management – Faster, cleaner rendering and loading
- Cristel Lib – Supports internal engine tweaks

### Better visuals 
- Iris Shaders – Shader support for custom visuals
- Continuity – Clean connected glass textures
- Entity Texture & Model Features (ETF/EMF) – Animated mobs with glowing effects

### Quality of Life
- Jade – Tooltips and mob/block information
- BetterF3 – A cleaner, customizable debug screen
- Horse Statistics – See horse speed and jump stats
- Mouse Tweaks – Easier inventory management
- ClickThrough Plus – Interact through transparent GUIs
- Mod Menu + Badges – Configure and explore your mods easily

### Shaders
These shaders are  included in the modpack but you can perfectly use other Iris shaders
- Complementary Reimagined – Balanced visuals with realistic lighting
- Miniature Shader – Toy-like lighting style with good performance
- BSL Shaders – High-end visuals for powerful systems

### Resource Packs 
These packs are included in the modpack but other recours packs also work perfectly
- Fresh Animations – Better, smoother mob movement
- Fresh Moves – Enhanced player animations
- Animated Items (Emissive) – Light-up tool textures
- Invisible Item Frames – Clean building decor
- Colourful Containers (Dark GUI) – Dark-mode menus and vivid chests


## Info
 - Release Date: 19/05/2025  modrinth realease 22/10/2025
 - Contact: arturdo2010@gmail.com
 - License: CC BY-NC 4.0
 - Made by: EmperatorArtur
 
 “A beautiful, optimized, and clean Vanilla+ experience — without the clutter.”
